extraction.one_line_summary: SPITZ Nans won from the breakaway after solo attack inside 25km, while LANDA Mikel attacked the GC group in final kilometers gaining 12 seconds on rivals.
tactical_patterns: SPITZ attacked solo before final climb knowing bigger riders would hesitate on rolling gradual finish terrain, not steep finale.
Movistar double-pronged GC assault: LANDA attacked final kilometer while LOPEZ marked CARAPAZ, splitting defensive responsibilities of rivals.
CONTI Valerio feigned weakness on descent then counter-attacked at 25km, revealing recovery tactic to avoid marking before decisive moment.
Breakaway riders initiated attacks at 25km specifically to avoid peloton's faster closing speed inside final timing checkpoint.

rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: attacked final kilometer on shallow gradient gaining 12 seconds, suggesting superior recovery from previous stage than GC rivals
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: teammates set up attack but he lacked legs, then marked CARAPAZ instead of attacking independently
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: chased LANDA personally rather than delegating to teammates, suggesting isolation concerns within own Movistar squad
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: losing 20+ seconds on shallow biathlon circuit finish indicates cumulative fatigue significantly worse than expected
rider_signals.SPITZ Nans: positive: larger rider successfully timed solo move for gradual finish rather than waiting for steep climb where physiology disadvantages him
